index.title: Aeon Atlas — Universe
index.content:
Aeon Atlas — Universe
Every entity in the aeon ecosystem we know about, rendered as one navigable graph.
Click the graph icon in the corner to open the global view (every node + edge), or browse via these starting points:

165 forks of aaronjmars/aeon — sample: upstream
21 operators with ≥ 2 atlas artifacts (multi-fork or fork+pack/ecosystem)
49 ecosystem projects publicly identifying as built on Aeon
18 community skill packs in the installable registry
4 novel skills shipped by ≥ 2 forks (i.e. spreading outside upstream)

How edges form
Every wikilink in these notes becomes a graph edge. A fork links to its parent fork, its matched ecosystem project, its authored pack, and the novel skills it ships. Ecosystem projects and packs link back. Open the graph view in the top-right corner.
Source data
Generated by scripts/atlas.mjs from atlas.json on 2026-06-05. The same data backs the interactive Cytoscape map, the ecosystem digest, the packs page, the innovations report, and the disabled-defaults audit.
